brief_summary: Hero art for the Trends pillar piece on ZMK firmware crossing from DIY into mainstream prebuilts: a 2px warm-grey 75% Q Ultra silhouette with a firmware code-file stack overlay at upper-left and a coral wireless radio motif (three concentric arcs + Bluetooth glyph + dot) rising from the MCU position on the top edge of the case, with warm-bronze accents on the top and bottom case edges.
source: plan/bearings.md § Article hero art — colorful keyboard SVGs (locked 2026-05-09)
template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject
subject: Top-down silhouette of a 75% prebuilt keyboard (Q Ultra family archetype) rendered in 2px warm-grey stroke, with a stylized three-card firmware code-file stack overlaid above the upper-left of the case (internal lines reading as source code without legible text), a coral wireless radio motif (three concentric arcs) rising from the top edge of the case near the MCU position, and a coral Bluetooth glyph plus solid coral dot at the radio origin. Warm-bronze theme accent on the top and bottom case edges; transparent background.
